title: erica lucida var. lucida
intro: Erica lucida var. lucida, also known as the bell heather, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the acidic soils of the mountainous regions of the British Isles. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Erica lucida var. lucida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
